name: reemteam-hq
description: ReemTeamHQ command center for operating and growing ReemTeam.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @reemteam/shared && npm run build -w @reemteam/ui && npm run build -w @reemteam/intelligence && npm run build -w @reemteam/hq-api && npm run build -w @reemteam/hq-dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @reemteam/intelligence && npm run test -w @reemteam/hq-api
